category_sources: source_facts.description identifies viddy as a modern watch command.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name and source_facts.repo use the official lowercase project name viddy.
docs_sources: source_facts.homepage and source_facts.repo point to the official GitHub project; README is the best official documentation surface supplied.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already has https://github.com/sachaos/viddy; per instructions repo was not re-evaluated.
tags_sources: source_facts.description says modern watch command; source_facts.executables lists viddy as a CLI executable.
